productName: Honey Stixx Infused Pre-roll - Strawberry Bliss - Flavored - Sativa
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Strawberry Bliss, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of strawberry, blue cheese, and cheese, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
